title: tanacetum pulchrum
intro: Tanacetum pulchrum, also known as the beautiful pyrethrum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Tanacetum pulchrum lie in its ability to act as a natural insect repellent and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Tanacetum pulchrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
